# GENERATED via: python3 platform/scripts/gen_test_scaffold.py <repo>
# DO NOT edit version pins manually — version comes from PyPI (iil-testkit SSoT)

# IIL Platform shared test factory (fixtures, assertions, smoke, ADR-048)
iil-testkit[smoke]>=0.4.0,<1

# Test runner
pytest>=8.0
pytest-django>=4.8
pytest-cov>=5.0
pytest-xdist>=3.5
pytest-randomly>=3.15

# Test data factories
factory-boy>=3.3

# HTTP mocking
responses>=0.25          # for requests-based clients
respx>=0.21              # for httpx-based async clients

# Contract testing
schemathesis>=3.30        # REST/JSON API contract tests via WSGI
jsonschema>=4.21          # Celery task payload + DB view schema validation

# HTML parsing (HTMX fragment tests — included via iil-testkit[smoke])
beautifulsoup4>=4.12
